message:
test(e2e): add safety workflow E2E tests

Add comprehensive E2E tests for the safety gate workflow:
- test_safety_status: Verify DCG availability reporting
- test_safety_check_safe_command: Test safe command checking
- test_safety_check_dangerous_command: Test dangerous command blocking
- test_safety_log: View safety event log
- test_safety_log_filters: Test --limit and --blocked-only filters
- test_safety_check_with_session: Test session ID tracking
- test_safety_check_dry_run: Test dry-run mode
- test_safety_workflow_complete: Full workflow integration test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
